choices.text: ~10× less boilerplate, declarative account validation, discriminator system, IDL auto-generation, typed TS client. Tradeoff: small CU overhead. Used by 95% of production Solana programs.
avm install X.Y.Z + avm use X.Y.Z + match anchor-lang = "X.Y.Z" in Cargo.toml. Anchor releases occasionally include breaking changes; pinning prevents surprise breakage.

questions.explanation: Pin avm + Cargo dep to same version.
